answer:
The song refers to the "Winter King," Frederick V of the Palatinate, who briefly became king of Bohemia but lost his territories after being defeated by forces loyal to Ferdinand II. "Rhine" refers to the Palatinate along the Rhine River, and "Prague" was his capital in Bohemia—both were lost after his short reign. Thus, the narrator mentions these places as lands the Winter King lost in battle.

\boxed{G}
